title: Dactylorhiza × dufftiana
taxonomy: Dactylorhiza × dufftiana is a hybrid orchid species. It is classified as a hybrid between Dactylorhiza fuchsii and Dactylorhiza maculata. The classification of Dactylorhiza × dufftiana is often considered as a taxonomic synonym of Dactylorhiza fuchsii subsp. fuchsii. This classification may vary depending on the source. The exact classification of Dactylorhiza × dufftiana can be subject to ongoing research and debate.

The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × dufftiana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable asset in traditional medicine.
